CustomField.description:
If select (Checked), the button will only work if 1 or more contacts are selected from the search results.
If not selected (unchecked), the button will perform the action even if there are not contacts selected from the search results.
CustomField.inlineHelpText:
If select (Checked), the button will only work if 1 or more contacts are selected from the search results.
If not selected (unchecked), the button will perform the action even if there are not contacts selected from the search results.
CustomField.label: Button Custom1 NeedSelection
